protocols.label: Re-wax
protocols.directive: Re-wax with the maker's dressing (Barbour/Otter Wax class). Warm the wax, work into seams and creases, cure warm overnight.

protocols.label: Condition leather
protocols.directive: Clean with a barely-damp cloth, then condition (Bick 4 / Saphir class). Never heat-dry. Stuff and air-dry 24h if soaked.

protocols.label: Re-proof suede
protocols.directive: Brush with a suede brush, re-apply protector spray. Keep out of sustained rain regardless.

protocols.label: Wool maintenance
protocols.directive: Brush down, air out 24h between wears, de-pill if needed. Wash rarely: cold hand-wash or dry clean once a season.

protocols.label: Denim wash cycle
protocols.directive: Wash inside-out, cold, minimal detergent, hang dry. Coated denim: spot-clean only unless the coating has already broken in.

protocols.label: Object-dyed garment care
protocols.directive: Cold wash separately or spot-clean. Dye transfer is real for the first several washes. Dry flat, out of direct sun.

protocols.label: Clean and inspect footwear
protocols.directive: Clean uppers and midsole, check sole separation, rotate pairs: never two consecutive wet days in the same pair.

protocols.label: Rotation check
protocols.directive: Inspect stress points (crotch seams, elbows, pocket corners). Repair early: reweaving beats replacing.
